title: OCI Network Load Balancer Deleted
description: Detects deletion of an OCI load balancer, which may cause service outages or indicate infrastructure sabotage.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.loadbalancer.deleteloadbalancer' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.networkloadbalancer.deletenetworkloadbalancer')))
